ForgeofWealthRule.Rule1: Forge of Wealth is a 5 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring 4 special multiplier slots that award x2 multiplier for every winning symbols on top of it.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

ForgeofWealthRule.Rule3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by bet size and bet level.
ForgeofWealthRule.Rule4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

ForgeofWealthShared.PayoutDesc1: At every spin, any combinations of 8 or more matching symbols appearing anywhere on the reels will result in a winning combination.
ForgeofWealthShared.PayoutDesc2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
ForgeofWealthShared.PayoutDesc3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
ForgeofWealthShared.PayoutDesc4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
ForgeofWealthShared.MultiplierSlotDesc1: There are 4 multiplier slots on the reels: 2nd row of the 2nd column, 4th row of the 2nd column, 2nd row of the 5th column, and 4th row of the 5th column.
ForgeofWealthShared.MultiplierSlotDesc2: At every round, if there is a winning symbol on top of any deactivated Multiplier slot, that Multiplier slot will be lighted up and activated.
ForgeofWealthShared.MultiplierSlotDesc3: At every round, if there is a winning symbol on top of any activated Multiplier slot, a x2 multiplier will be collected for each activated multiplier slot with winning symbols.
ForgeofWealthShared.MultiplierSlotDesc4: At the end of the spin, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier.
ForgeofWealthShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
ForgeofWealthShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: After wins are paid, the total win multiplier will remain until it is combined with the total win multiplier of the next winning free spin.
ForgeofWealthShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
ForgeofWealthShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
